# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        -
          PolicyName: execution-role-policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              -
                Sid: ExecuteLambdaFunction
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:*'
                  - 's3:*'
                  - 'dynamodb:*'
                  - 'sqs:*'
                  - 'sns:*'
                Resource: '*'

  LambdaReadOnlyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: lambda-read-only-policy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: S3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource: '*'

  LambdaExecutionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: lambda-execution-policy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: S3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:*'
            Resource: '*'

  LambdaReadWritePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: lambda-read-write-policy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: S3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  ExecutionRole:
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Description: IAM execution role for lambda function
